name: @forwardimpact/libbridge
description: Threaded-channel bridge primitives — relay messages between human channels (GitHub Discussions, Microsoft Teams) and the Kata agent team.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.goal: Bridge Threaded Channels to the Agent Team
jobs.trigger: Building a chat or discussion adapter and reaching for last project's callback registry, rate limiter, and history-bound prompt builder.
jobs.bigHire: ship a threaded-channel adapter without reimplementing the intake skeleton, callback registry, durable thread state, and resume-trigger contract.
jobs.littleHire: register a callback token, build a bounded prompt, and dispatch a workflow without managing each piece directly.
jobs.competesWith: copy-pasting channel adapter boilerplate; per-channel workflow YAML composition; ephemeral in-memory thread state that vanishes on restart
